# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: linkerd
  name: linkerd-controller
spec:
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-controller
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: linkerd-controller
        image: linkerd/linkerd2:v2.9.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 4140
          name: linkerd-api
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9990
          name: linkerd-tap
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2beta2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  namespace: linkerd
  name: linkerd-controller
spec:
  maxReplicas: 10
  minReplicas: 1
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
    kind: Deployment
    name: linkerd-controller

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceMesh
metadata:
  name: mesh
spec:
  connectivity:
    clusterDomains:
    - linkerd.local
  policies:
  - apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
    kind: AuthenticationPolicy
    metadata:
      name: authz-external
    spec:
      externalSecretRef:
        name: my-authz-secret
    template:
      tlsConfig: {}
      meshConfig: {}

  - apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
    kind: AuthenticationPolicy
    metadata:
      name: authz-internal
    spec:
      hosts: ["*"]
      tlsConfig: {}
      meshConfig: {}

  - apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
    kind: ServicePolicy
    metadata:
      name: default-policy
    spec:
      sources:
      - serviceAccounts: []
      destinations:
      - services: ["*"]
      actions:
      - accessLogged
      authPolicies: [authz-internal]
